name: decocookies Hand Decorated Tree Cookie - 2.2oz
description:
Holiday Gigglescape Hand-Decorated Ready-to-Eat Pre-Baked Vanilla Sugar Cookie (1ct) is a delightful and festive treat perfect for celebrating the season.
This seasonal cookie features beautifully hand-decorated Tree design on a soft yet slightly crunchy vanilla sugar cookie. The cookie is individually wrapped to ensure freshness, making it ideal for stocking stuffers, Holiday parties, gift-giving, and everyday snacking.
Whether you're looking for a convenient pre-baked dessert, a fun seasonal snack, or a charming edible gift, this cookie offers delicious homemade flavor without the hassle of baking.
Includes 1 Hand-Decorated Vanilla Sugar Cookie — A delicious blend of soft and crunchy textures. Pre-Baked & Ready-to-Eat — No prep required, enjoy straight from the package. Individually Wrapped — Maintains freshness and makes sharing easy. Holiday-Themed Design — Perfect for seasonal celebrations and gifting. 2.2 oz — The perfect size for snacking. Nut-Free Cookies — Made in a 100% Peanut & Tree Nut-Free Facility for worry-free deliciousness.
Enjoy the perfect combination of convenience, quality, and festive charm with Gigglescape hand-decorated cookies!
